translation_notes: Signal emphasizes retracement setups in trending markets with confirmation from three fundamentally different data types: (1) PRICE_ACTION via retracement and support/resistance detection using SMA crossovers, (2) MOMENTUM via RSI confirmation, and (3) VOLATILITY via ATR confirmation. Direction is context-dependent based on trend direction. Stop loss derived from reward-to-risk requirement of 1.5:1. Exit conditions use indicator reversal (RSI crosses back through midpoint) as proxy for 'two or more indicators reverse confirmation signal' per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance.
validation_issues: entry_long: phantom condition 'atr_14 > 0' is always true
entry_short: phantom condition 'atr_14 > 0' is always true
